message:
prompt: simplify coordinator graph to real engineering workflow

Remove tactical cleanup loop and file-write gate check. The graph
now describes the actual coordinator workflow: scout → delegate →
verify → fix loop → submit. Cleanup is the implementer's job;
if the workspace is wrong, that's a verification failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
